title: Shower Curtains Mould Proof Resistant - Leaves Patterned Semi-Transarent Shower Curtain, PEVA Waterproof Bathroom Curtains with 12 Hooks, 180 x 180 cm
features: Material : The shower curtain is made of high quality and eco-friendly PEVA material. Reinforced and rust proof metal grommet header prevents tearing and insures long term use

Anti Mould and Waterproof: The shower curtain liner is lightweight, which is easy to wipe. The smooth shower liner is waterproof and draines quickly, reducing the risk of mold and mildew formation. it will let you and your family have a dry bathroom environment

Flower Semi-Transarent Design: Very modern and classy clear with pearl white 3D pebble design that allow enough light to come through and let you have privacy .180*180cm fits most standard size bathtub or shower tall and suitable for straight or curved shower liner rods
Lasting Durability: This clear shower curtain is sturdy with 12 rustproof metal grommets , can be hung and taken out easily and last a long time

Widely Use: Semi-Transarent bath curtain allow light to enter, allowing more air to circulate and making your spa shower experience more enjoyable. Simple but interesting for most bathroom decoration, can be used in bathrooms, door curtains, home, hotel, coach curtains, school, athletic club, party backdrops etc.
description: Product description Elevate your bathroom decor with our stylish and functional Shower Curtain, featuring a modern, semi-transparent leaf pattern that offers both privacy and light. The reinforced, rust-proof metal grommet header ensures durability, while the 12 rustproof metal grommets allow for easy hanging and removal. Measuring 70.9 inches wide and 70.9 inches long, it fits most standard bathtub or shower sizes. Machine washable for convenient care. Safety Warning Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Do not iron. Always turn off the iron when not in use. Keep out of reach of children and pets.
